GitHub LinkedIn Email

Kristian Uremovic

Cybersecurity Researcher · Purdue University

Cybersecurity researcher at Purdue CERIAS studying compiler-level binary hardening for ARM embedded systems. Concurrent research in LLM mechanistic interpretability and ML anomaly detection through the Purdue Data Mine. Pursuing a B.S. in Cybersecurity with a Finance minor.

View Projects

About

Background

Cybersecurity researcher at Purdue CERIAS studying compiler-level binary hardening for ARM embedded systems. Concurrent research in LLM mechanistic interpretability and ML anomaly detection through the Purdue Data Mine. Pursuing a B.S. in Cybersecurity with a Finance minor.

Education Purdue University — B.S. Cybersecurity, Finance Minor (Expected 2027)

My work

Featured Projects

Personal Research

GCC Flag Simulations

Repository of documented C files simulating GCC hardening flag mechanisms in plain C without using the actual compiler flag. Each file demonstrates the injected mechanism with full documentation and is reproduced from memory before new material is added.

CGCCSecuritySystems Programming
security

Credentials

Certifications

CompTIA 2025
Completed

CompTIA Network+

Vendor-neutral networking certification covering protocols, routing, switching, infrastructure, and network troubleshooting.

CompTIA Summer 2025
In Progress

CompTIA Security+

Industry-standard certification covering network security, threats, vulnerabilities, cryptography, identity management, and risk management.

GIAC Planned
Planned

GICSP — Global Industrial Cyber Security Professional

Specialized certification for industrial control system (ICS) and operational technology (OT) security. Highly relevant to embedded systems and critical infrastructure research.

Cisco Planned
Planned

CCNA — Cisco Certified Network Associate

Comprehensive networking certification covering IP addressing, routing protocols, network security fundamentals, and Cisco IOS configuration.

Summary

Cybersecurity researcher at Purdue CERIAS studying compiler-level binary hardening for ARM embedded systems. Concurrent research in LLM mechanistic interpretability and ML anomaly detection through the Purdue Data Mine. Pursuing a B.S. in Cybersecurity with a Finance minor.

Security Wireshark · Ghidra

Notable Projects

GCC Flag Simulations C · GCC · Security · Systems Programming

Repository of documented C files simulating GCC hardening flag mechanisms in plain C without using the actual compiler flag. Each file demonstrates the injected mechanism with full documentation and is reproduced from memory before new material is added.

Education

Purdue University — B.S. Cybersecurity, Finance Minor (Expected 2027)
